WENJIA - Dimensional Spirit Rescue

Navigate a mystical cat-like energy creature through dimensional rifts to rescue trapped spirits. Switch between the vibrant Material World and the ethereal Energy World to solve platforming puzzles. Each dimension has unique platforms and hazards - what blocks your path in one world might be your bridge in another. Progress through increasingly challenging levels, but beware: falling into pits or touching enemies means failure. Master the art of dimensional shifting to succeed!

Arrow Left/Right: Move horizontally | Space: Jump | Z: Shift between Material World and Energy World | Enter: Start game from start screen | ESC: Pause/Unpause game | R: Restart and return to start screen
